title: Dashboard
description: Your club card, profile status, partner access, and business activity in one place.
cardDescription: Use the QR code or public verification link when a partner needs to confirm your membership status.
cardMissingDescription: Your digital club card was not found. Contact the club team if this state does not change.
profileDescription: Keep your public member basics complete for club operations.
businessDescription: Published businesses appear in the public directory. Draft and pending profiles stay private.
noBusinessDescription: Business profile submission is a later MVP surface. For now, admin can manage existing profiles.
introductionsDescription: Requests are admin-mediated and visible here for eligible business members.
introductionsRestricted: Business Introduction access is available for business members.
